title: New Employee Onboarding Checklist
content:
# New Employee Onboarding Checklist

## Pre-Arrival Preparation
1. IT equipment request (3 days before start date)
2. Workstation assignment
3. System account creation
4. Department manager notification

## Day of Arrival
1. HR reception (9:00)
2. Onboarding training (10:00-12:00)
3. Department introduction (14:00)
4. IT equipment pickup

## Security Requirements
- Positions requiring database access must pass a security clearance review
- Security clearance is handled by the Security department, typically takes 1-2 business days

## Special Cases
- Equipment out of stock: Register the request, prioritize allocation upon arrival
- No department manager: Save the onboarding notification as a draft, HR will coordinate directly

title: IT Equipment Request Process
content:
# IT Equipment Request Process

## Request Steps
1. Log in to OA system → Asset Management → Equipment Request
2. Fill out the request form (requires department manager approval)
3. IT department reviews and processes within 2 business days
4. Notification sent when equipment is ready for pickup

## Standard Configurations
- Development roles: MacBook Pro 14-inch + external monitor
- Non-development roles: MacBook Air or ThinkPad
- Data/AI roles: High-performance workstation (requires additional approval)

## Out-of-Stock Handling
- Out-of-stock equipment is added to the waitlist
- Allocated in order of request date upon arrival
- Temporary loaner equipment may be requested during the shortage

## Important Notes
- New employee equipment must be requested 3 days before the start date
- Special configurations require additional approval from department director
- All IT equipment must be returned upon departure
